title: nasturtium calycotrichum
intro: Nasturtium calycotrichum, also known as Mexican tarragon or Tree nasturtium, is a flowering plant in the Brassicaceae family, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and pungent, anise-like flavor. The medicinal properties of this plant include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of nasturtium calycotrichum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, capsules, or tinctures, and are often used to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and respiratory issues.
